positive: Intricate symmetrical mandala design composed of cosmic elements: glowing nebula clouds, interconnected geometric constellations, stylized crescent moons, and flowing astronomical glyphs. The palette features deep midnight indigo, electric cyan, brilliant gold accents, and soft ethereal violet. Highly detailed linework, clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and centralized composition. Studio shot, vector illustration quality, suitable for textile printing, symmetrical pattern repeat, high energy, cosmic aesthetic, 8K.
